03-platform-api.md.title: Database URL with Credentials
03-platform-api.md.description: Database URLs with embedded passwords expose your database.
03-platform-api.md.fix: Move to environment variable or secrets manager

05-ui-and-install.md.title: Database URL with Credentials
05-ui-and-install.md.description: Database URLs with embedded passwords expose your database.
05-ui-and-install.md.fix: Move to environment variable or secrets manager

packages/shared/src/url.ts.title: SSRF: Cloud Metadata Endpoint Access
packages/shared/src/url.ts.description: Cloud metadata endpoint in code. If URL is user-controlled, this enables credential theft.
packages/shared/src/url.ts.fix: Block metadata IPs in URL validation. Use IMDSv2 on AWS (requires token header).

packages/shared/src/url.ts.title: SSRF: User Input in fetch()
packages/shared/src/url.ts.description: User-controlled URL passed to fetch() enables SSRF. Validate against an allowlist.
packages/shared/src/url.ts.fix: Validate URL against allowlist: new URL(input).hostname must match allowed hosts

packages/shared/src/url.ts.title: SSRF: Internal IP Pattern
packages/shared/src/url.ts.description: Internal IP address in code. Verify it is not reachable via user-controlled URLs.
packages/shared/src/url.ts.fix: Block private IP ranges in URL validation for user-supplied URLs

packages/cli/package-lock.json.title: Historical Secret: Upstash Redis REST Token
packages/cli/package-lock.json.description: Secret found in current code AND in git history (commit a17ecd9dd9).
packages/cli/package-lock.json.fix: Remove from code, rotate the credential, then clean git history with BFG or git filter-repo

packages/platform/package-lock.json.title: Historical Secret: Upstash Redis REST Token
packages/platform/package-lock.json.description: Secret found in current code AND in git history (commit a17ecd9dd9).
packages/platform/package-lock.json.fix: Remove from code, rotate the credential, then clean git history with BFG or git filter-repo

.github/workflows/release.yml.title: CI/CD: Install Without Lockfile
.github/workflows/release.yml.description: CI runs npm install without --frozen-lockfile. Builds are non-deterministic.
.github/workflows/release.yml.fix: Use npm ci (not npm install) or yarn --frozen-lockfile in CI

.github/workflows/release.yml.title: CI/CD: Unverified Third-Party Action
.github/workflows/release.yml.description: Third-party GitHub Action not from verified publisher. Review source code.
.github/workflows/release.yml.fix: Pin to commit SHA, review the action source, or use an official alternative

.github/workflows/release.yml.title: CI/CD: Unverified Third-Party Action
.github/workflows/release.yml.description: Third-party GitHub Action not from verified publisher. Review source code.
.github/workflows/release.yml.fix: Pin to commit SHA, review the action source, or use an official alternative

docs/ci-examples/azure-pipelines.yml.title: CI/CD: Install Without Lockfile
docs/ci-examples/azure-pipelines.yml.description: CI runs npm install without --frozen-lockfile. Builds are non-deterministic.
docs/ci-examples/azure-pipelines.yml.fix: Use npm ci (not npm install) or yarn --frozen-lockfile in CI

docs/ci-examples/bitbucket-pipelines.yml.title: CI/CD: Install Without Lockfile

packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.title: API: Route Without Auth Check
packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.description: State-changing API route without visible auth middleware. Verify authentication is enforced.
packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.fix: Add auth middleware: router.post("/api/data", authMiddleware, handler)

packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.title: API: Route Without Auth Check
packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.description: State-changing API route without visible auth middleware. Verify authentication is enforced.
packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.fix: Add auth middleware: router.post("/api/data", authMiddleware, handler)

packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.title: API: No Input Validation
packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.description: Request body used without validation. Validate with Zod, Joi, or Yup.
packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.fix: Validate: const data = schema.parse(req.body) using Zod or similar

packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.title: Vibe Code: DELETE Endpoint Without Auth Check
packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.description: DELETE endpoint defined without visible auth middleware. AI often generates CRUD routes without access control.
packages/platform/src/server/api/provisi.fix: Add authentication middleware: router.delete("/resource/:id", authMiddleware, handler)

packages/platform/src/server/api/servers.title: API: Sensitive Data in URL Parameters
packages/platform/src/server/api/servers.description: Sensitive data in URL parameters gets logged in server logs, browser history, and proxies.
packages/platform/src/server/api/servers.fix: Move sensitive data to request headers or body

packages/platform/src/server/api/servers.title: API: Sensitive Data in URL Parameters
packages/platform/src/server/api/servers.description: Sensitive data in URL parameters gets logged in server logs, browser history, and proxies.

packages/platform/src/server/api/servers.title: API: Debug/Test Endpoint in Code
packages/platform/src/server/api/servers.description: Debug/test/admin endpoint detected. Ensure it is not accessible in production.
packages/platform/src/server/api/servers.fix: Remove debug endpoints or protect with auth + environment check

packages/platform/src/server/api/servers.title: Agent: Runs With Elevated Permissions
packages/platform/src/server/api/servers.description: Agent configured with elevated permissions (admin, root, service-role). Prompt injection inherits these privileges.
packages/platform/src/server/api/servers.fix: Apply principle of least privilege. Agents should have minimal permissions required for their specific task.

packages/agent/src/services/caddy.servic.title: Agent: Runs With Elevated Permissions
packages/agent/src/services/caddy.servic.description: Agent configured with elevated permissions (admin, root, service-role). Prompt injection inherits these privileges.
packages/agent/src/services/caddy.servic.fix: Apply principle of least privilege. Agents should have minimal permissions required for their specific task.

packages/platform/src/server/auth/deploy.title: Agent: Credentials Passed Between Tools
packages/platform/src/server/auth/deploy.description: Agent forwards credentials between tools or to external services. Compromised tools can steal credentials.
packages/platform/src/server/auth/deploy.matched: function deployTokenAuth(req: Request, res: Response, next: Next
packages/platform/src/server/auth/deploy.fix: Scope credentials per-tool. Never forward authentication tokens between tool invocations.

packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.title: Privacy: PII Logged to Console
packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.description: PII fields logged to console. Log output may be stored in log aggregation services, exposing sensitive user data.
packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.fix: Remove PII from log statements. Use structured logging with PII redaction: logger.info({ userId: user.id }) instead of logging full user objects.

packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.title: SSRF: Internal IP Pattern
packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.description: Internal IP address in code. Verify it is not reachable via user-controlled URLs.
packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.fix: Block private IP ranges in URL validation for user-supplied URLs

packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.title: SSRF: Internal IP Pattern
packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.description: Internal IP address in code. Verify it is not reachable via user-controlled URLs.
packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.fix: Block private IP ranges in URL validation for user-supplied URLs

packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.title: Privacy: IP Address Logged Without Anonymization
packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.description: IP addresses logged without anonymization. Under GDPR, IP addresses are personal data.
packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.fix: Anonymize IP addresses in logs: mask the last octet (192.168.1.xxx) or hash before logging.

packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.title: Privacy: IP Address Logged Without Anonymization
packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.description: IP addresses logged without anonymization. Under GDPR, IP addresses are personal data.
packages/platform/src/server/cli.ts.fix: Anonymize IP addresses in logs: mask the last octet (192.168.1.xxx) or hash before logging.

packages/cli/src/config.ts.title: Agent: Manifest loaded without signature verification
packages/cli/src/config.ts.description: Agent manifest is loaded/parsed without a subsequent signature or integrity check — manifest tampering goes undetected.
packages/cli/src/config.ts.fix: Verify manifest signature or compute expected SHA-256 before trusting its contents.

packages/cli/src/config.ts.title: Agent: Manifest loaded without signature verification

packages/cli/src/index.ts.description: Agent manifest is loaded/parsed without a subsequent signature or integrity check — manifest tampering goes undetected.
packages/cli/src/index.ts.fix: Verify manifest signature or compute expected SHA-256 before trusting its contents.
